text:
Hi, i found an error on line 144
 
 isc_bufger_activeregion(source, &sr);
 
 the correct is
 
 isc_buffer_activeregion(source, &sr);
 
 i'm using freebsd 6.1-RELEASE and i'm compiling the latest version of cvsup
 RELENG_6 for amd64
 
 att
